---
listing:
  contents: [posts]
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, image, description, categories]
  feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  date-format: MM-DD-YYYY
comments: false
description: Recent posts
pagetitle: Nerdy Momo Cat
---

<h2 style="margin-bottom: 2rem !important">
Hi, I'm Nerdy Momo Cat
</h2>

::: me
![](images/me.png)
:::

Personal Knowledge Management | Notion, Coding & Automations, Note Taking and Sketchnoting.

### Get in touch

Email me at [nerdymomocat\@gmail.com](mailto:nerdymomocat@gmail.com) or DM me on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/nerdymomocat) if you'd like to chat!

### Posts
